signals.signal_title: SLB Delfi digital platform $2.44B revenue FY2024 — 20% growth, 6,500+ users
signals.signal_description: SLB's Digital & Integration segment generated $2.44B in FY2024 revenue, up 20% YoY. Delfi cloud-native platform has 6,500+ users with 32% YoY growth. Cloud/AI/Edge platform growing at ~60% CAGR since 2021. CEO targets $3B digital revenue by 2025. Confirms SLB as the highest-digital-intensity OFS company by revenue.

signals.signal_title: SLB NVIDIA partnership for AI compute at wellsite — autonomous drilling systems
signals.signal_description: SLB partnered with NVIDIA to deploy AI compute at wellsite for autonomous drilling and real-time reservoir characterization. Automated drilling footage reached 2.4M feet in Q1 2024, up 88% YoY. NVIDIA partnership confirms enterprise-grade AI infrastructure investment.

signals.signal_title: SLB acquires ChampionX July 2025 — adds 200,000 connected assets to digital portfolio
signals.signal_description: SLB closed the $7.75B acquisition of ChampionX in July 2025, adding 200,000 connected chemical production assets to its digital portfolio. Significantly expands edge AI and connected asset management scope, driving post-acquisition IT integration demand.

signals.signal_title: SLB OSDU founding member — open subsurface data platform driving cloud standardization
signals.signal_description: SLB is a founding member of the Open Subsurface Data Universe (OSDU) data platform standard. Drives cloud-native data standardization across the upstream sector. Positions SLB as the preferred integration layer for E&P digital infrastructure.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $35.94B with $2.44B digital revenue (6.8% — highest digital intensity in OFS sector). 113,000 employees globally. Houston is primary technology decision hub — within STOLA. No incumbent MSP. Azure primary cloud for Delfi platform. Microsoft 365 confirmed. Multi-cloud (AWS, GCP also used). NVIDIA partnership confirmed. OSDU founding member. ai_maturity_score=19 (≥15 — high AI maturity bonus applies). ChampionX acquisition July 2025 adds 200,000 connected assets. WWT opportunity: Houston account, no MSP, NVIDIA alignment (WWT 7x NVIDIA Americas Partner of Year), Delfi platform expansion, AI infrastructure demand from connected assets growth. Highest-priority Tier 2 account.
